criteria.criterion: PlanContext gains `hierarchy_incomplete: bool = False` and `hierarchy_incomplete_detail: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)` in det_floor.py

_assemble_context_uncached's list_tickets call retries once (2 attempts total, 50ms fixed delay, same broad Exception predicate) before setting hierarchy_incomplete=True, hierarchy_incomplete_detail=["enumeration"] on total failure

Per-child show_ticket fetch gets same bounded-retry-then-flag treatment; on per-child failure the child's id is appended to hierarchy_incomplete_detail and hierarchy_incomplete=True is set, with the existing summary-row fallback unchanged
plan_review_precheck reads pctx.hierarchy_incomplete/pctx.hierarchy_incomplete_detail directly and threads both into its base/coverage dicts, used at its own finalize_verdict call
plan_review_coach reads both fields via ctx.inputs.get(...) (mirroring det_coverage), NOT via any pctx attribute

All three gate_dispatch.py recovery/degrade paths (_recover_plan_review_coach_failure, _recover_plan_review_verify_failure, _degraded_plan_review_verdict) thread hierarchy_incomplete/hierarchy_incomplete_detail into the coverage dict — five finalize_verdict call sites total

finalize_verdict (orchestrator.py) and drift_floor._recompute_verdict_after_drop (drift_floor.py:190-211) each gain an `elif coverage.get("hierarchy_incomplete"): verdict = "INDETERMINATE"` branch; the drift_floor branch exercised through all three call sites

plan_review_precheck_output.schema.json declares hierarchy_incomplete (boolean) and hierarchy_incomplete_detail (string array) in properties, neither in required; additionalProperties: false is preserved

All four uses: plan_review_coach steps in src/rebar/llm/workflow/gates/plan-review.yaml (both branch arms' then/else) have their with: block extended with hierarchy_incomplete and hierarchy_incomplete_detail referencing steps.precheck.outputs
No relevance-exception carve-out is implemented; ticket body documents why, citing parent epic AC #4 and the has_children/container-criteria-suppression mechanism

Test coverage includes: (a) total-enumeration-failure -> hierarchy_incomplete_detail == ["enumeration"] exactly; (b) partial per-child failure -> hierarchy_incomplete_detail contains specific failed child id; (c) both cases -> verdict is INDETERMINATE at at least one finalize_verdict site and survives drift-floor/xcheck drop without reverting to PASS
